apigateway.restapi.s3location.Bucket.Docs: The name of the S3 bucket where the OpenAPI file is stored.

apigateway.restapi.s3location.ETag.Docs: The Amazon S3 ETag (a file checksum) of the OpenAPI file. If you don't specify a value, API Gateway skips ETag validation of your OpenAPI file.

apigateway.restapi.s3location.Key.Docs: The file name of the OpenAPI file (Amazon S3 object name).

apigateway.restapi.s3location.Version.Docs: For versioning-enabled buckets, a specific version of the OpenAPI file.
